positive: A retro-futuristic illustration of a stylized, chrome-plated cityscape viewed from above at sunset. Incorporate elements of 1980s synthwave aesthetics, including grid lines, palm trees, and glowing neon signs in turquoise and hot pink. High contrast, grainy texture, vaporwave style.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, natural elements, messy, watercolor
